headline.vsl_adaptation: Have you been told you need knee replacement surgery? Before you commit to months of immobility, pain, rehab, and hefty medical bills - consider this FDA-approved alternative that's covered by Medicare...

lead.opening_verbatim: People who suffer from knee pain typically try supplements or pain medications before seeking help from a doctor. When all else fails and the pain is too much, some feel that surgery is the only option. Before you put yourself through months of immobility, pain, rehab, and hefty medical bills, consider something else.

mechanism.mechanism_description: FDA-approved gel supplement is added to knee joint via fluoroscopy-guided injection. The gel bonds with naturally occurring joint fluid to create a lubricating and cushioning layer, reducing pain, inflammation and swelling. Like adding oil to a car engine - tops up the joint's natural fluid lost to osteoarthritis.
mechanism.technology_element: Live motion imaging fluoroscopy ensures injection accuracy

proof_elements.verbatim: New FDA-Approved Treatment Proven to Relieve Knee Pain
Covered by most insurance plans including Medicare
over 100 million Americans suffer from knee and joint pain
I can now walk normally, and without pain! Minnesota Arthritis Center has given me new life.

key_sections.content_verbatim: Osteoarthritis, also known as degenerative joint disease, is the most common type of arthritis. Healthy knees are naturally filled with Synovial fluid that helps lubricate and provide cushioning. In osteoarthritis the amount of synovial fluid is diminished and the joint space becomes more compressed. This causes the bones to rub together resulting in pain, swelling, and loss of motion of the joint.

FDA-approved gel supplement is then added to the knee joint and the healing process begins. The gel bonds with naturally occurring joint fluid to create a lubricating and cushioning layer in the knee. This reduces pain, inflammation, and swelling of the joint.

The easiest way to think of our gel treatments is that they top up the joint's natural fluid, which has been lost because of osteoarthritis. It is similar to adding oil to your car's engine. If your car were to run low on oil you would have some serious wear and tear on the moving parts.

surgery.cost: Deductible, co-pay, medications, time off work, etc.
surgery.risk: Complications, poor outcome, addiction to pain medications

non_surgical_treatment.cost: Covered by most insurance plans including Medicare

testimonials.quote: After completing treatment at Minnesota Arthritis Center, I came away feeling relief. When I started there I was limping badly due to pain in my knees. Over the course of my treatment I have experienced a marked improvement in the pain level and flexibility.

Before I came to Minnesota Arthritis Center I had been told I would never have relief from the excruciating pain in my knees without knee replacement. But after the treatment and physical therapy at Minnesota Arthritis Center I can now walk normally, and without pain! Thank you! Minnesota Arthritis Center has given me new life.

candidacy_checklist: Do you wake up with knee pain?
Does your knee pain keep you from certain activities?
Have you been told you need a knee replacement?
Are you active and sometimes suffer from sore knees?
Do you take medications for knee pain?
Do you have difficulty going up and down stairs due to knee pain?
Are you considering surgery to alleviate knee pain?
Have you tried everything to get rid of knee pain with no success?
